scripts.dev: NODE_USE_ENV_PROXY=1 HTTP_PROXY=${HTTP_PROXY:-$http_proxy} HTTPS_PROXY=${HTTPS_PROXY:-$https_proxy} ALL_PROXY=${ALL_PROXY:-$all_proxy} next dev
scripts.start: NODE_USE_ENV_PROXY=1 HTTP_PROXY=${HTTP_PROXY:-$http_proxy} HTTPS_PROXY=${HTTPS_PROXY:-$https_proxy} ALL_PROXY=${ALL_PROXY:-$all_proxy} next start
